title: (YTPMV) Dead-Alive
description:
Groovy

Original Song: Streets of Rage 2 - Never Return Alive
Original Source: Evil Dead 2

I feel like I really put a lot of time and effort into this one, so hopefully it shows. Started the audio for this almost exactly a year ago, and almost decided to scrap it from having no ideas/motivation for visuals. Glad I decided against that obviously... The audio especially was a lot of fun for me this time around. This song, as well as the source, felt like quite the challenge for me. I have wanted to do a Streets of Rage song for many years now. (Honestly I originally settled on this one because I thought it was more fitting for a Halloween special, lol) And the Evil Dead series has been on my mind for quite some time, with the second movie being one of my favorite films of all time, and all the chainsaws just seemed to work perfectly. I hope everyone enjoys this as much as I did making it.
Partially inspired by the only other Evil Dead YTPMV that I know of:
https://youtu.be/mew2Qr6OtRo

All visuals and audio were done in Sony Vegas.
